rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 1, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT GERARD O'KEEFFE, O'KEEFFE FAMILY TRUST, MAKRAS REAL ESTATE, DAVID O'KEEFFE, KARI O'KEEFFE, G. MAKRAS, FARAH MAKRAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of implied [contractual] covenant of good faith and fair dealing is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege this cause of action against parties to the contract(s) containing the implied covenant as addressed in detail in Defendants' moving papers. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is overruled. First Amended Complaint alleges sufficient facts to support this cause of action and addresses the "Disclosure Regarding Real Estate Agency" per this Court's February 7, 2017 order. = (501/REQ)
